bridge_url.description: URL of the gurney-memgraph HTTP bridge (the Python service that wraps FalkorDB + Graphiti). IPC and Embedded transports are deliberately not supported.

bridge_token.description: Optional bearer token sent in the Authorization header. Leave blank for unauthenticated local bridges.

namespace.description: Logical namespace inside the bridge. One bridge can serve multiple Gurney installs by setting different namespaces.

recall_top_k.description: Max facts the recall_memory tool returns per query.

extraction_batch_size.description: Run the extraction sweep once at least this many new messages have accumulated since the last sweep.

extraction_cron.description: Cron expression (minute granularity) for the background extraction sweep.
